---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem would this solve?**
Describe the real-world situation this would help with — e.g., "our group has trouble with...". Concrete examples from actual use are more useful than abstract feature ideas.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Have you checked whether this is already an intentional exclusion?**
Please check [`docs/PRD.md`](../../docs/PRD.md) §"Explicitly Excluded from v1" first — some features (per-member logins, multi-tenancy, online payments, per-member privacy overrides, etc.) are deliberately out of scope for stated reasons. If your idea overlaps with one of these, explain what's changed or what we might be missing.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any other ways to solve the same problem, including workarounds you're currently using.

**Additional context**
Anything else — mockups, links, or examples from other tools.
